setup.header_sub: Configure your institution, academic year, class, subjects and assessment details before importing student data.
setup.mode_institution_desc: A teacher or coaching centre tracking a whole class or batch of students — with rank, class average, and at-risk flags.
setup.mode_individual_desc: A parent tracking one or more children, or an aspirant tracking their own prep — no class comparison, just personal progress over time.
setup.multi_child_hint: 💡 Tracking more than one child? Just add another row in the downloaded template's MARKS+CONTEXT sheet with a different Student ID — each child gets their own switcher entry on the Dashboard, never compared to each other.
setup.update_sheet_heading: Already filled Test 1? Add Test 2 / Test 3 to it here
setup.update_sheet_desc: Load your existing filled workbook, add the new test below, then re-download — your existing marks are kept, only new blank columns are added.
setup.btn_cancel_merge: Cancel — start a fresh template instead
setup.cta_ready_html: Ready! Use ⬇ Download Template at the top of this page
setup.cta_ready_sub: 2 tabs: SETUP (auto-filled) · MARKS+CONTEXT (add roster + marks, teacher fills offline)
setup.incomplete_heading: Complete required fields to download template
